title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage GGUF models locally with a built-in ModelFile DSL and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and async SDK for the Ollama API; installable from PyPI.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; published on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package offering Ollama chat, embed, and tool-calling wrappers.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Full-featured, open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model with multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library wrapping the Ollama REST API with POJO models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich-terminal CLI for Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting, and themes.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose stacks (CPU/GPU) for running Ollama server containerized.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter that proxies OpenAI SDK calls to a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot bringing Ollama chat, image-to-text, and slash commands to any server.

title: ollama-nim-client
summary: Pure Nim client for Ollama REST API with async HTTP and native Model type mappings.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library that wraps the Ollama REST API with async methods and strongly-typed models.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container for CI-based LLM testing.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash commands to query local models with thread support.

title: ollama-qt-gui
summary: Cross-platform Qt6 desktop GUI for Ollama with model manager and chat interface.
